payload.subject: Re: Your application
payload.body:
hi,

thanks so much for letting us know — we'd love to accept the spot for Mira in the toddler room starting september.

please let me know if you need anything else from us to confirm.

thanks again

value.rationale: Drafted an acceptance reply confirming the toddler room spot for Mira as requested, since accepting seems the natural response to a spot opening with a reply-by deadline.
